summary: Tested dynamic Terms & Policies integration in ProposalView and Delete Proposal functionality - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend API returns 8 policy sections correctly, frontend renders accordion-style expandable sections with icons, sub-sections display properly for Important Notes (General, Hotel, Tours and Transfers). Delete Proposal confirmed working.

issues: React hydration warning: tr cannot be child of span - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

dynamic_terms_api.details: API returns 8 policy sections with correct structure, ordering, icons, and sub-sections

terms_rendering_in_proposalview.details: All 8 sections rendered: Any Other Commitments, Important Notes, Important Notes - Europe, Terms and Conditions, Our Scope of Services, Hotel Cancellation Policy, Payment Policies, Amendment of Booking by Guest

accordion_expand_collapse.details: All sections expand/collapse correctly with smooth animation

icons_display.details: 16 icons displayed in terms sections (info, shield, hotel, creditCard, check, briefcase, edit)

important_notes_default_expanded.details: Important Notes section is expanded by default showing all sub-sections

city_country_filtering.details: API correctly filters by city (Tbilisi returns 8 terms) and country (Georgia returns 7 terms)

delete_proposal.details: Delete button shows confirmation dialog, removes proposal from list on confirm, properly updates UI

critical_code_review_comments: ProposalView.jsx correctly fetches terms from API based on proposal destination (lines 284-325)
TERMS_ICONS mapping properly maps icon names to Lucide React components (lines 14-24)
ExpandableSection component uses AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Sub-sections render as h4 headings with ordered lists (lines 753-766)
Commitments category gets special amber/yellow styling (lines 735-741)
Delete proposal in MyProposals.jsx properly handles auth token and error cases (lines 70-88)
seed_data_creation: Created test proposal in pytest for delete test (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Terms & Policies fully working. 8 sections from DB, all rendering correctly with icons and sub-sections. Delete Proposal confirmed working with proper auth. Test flow: Login -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> View Proposal -> TERMS AND POLICIES tab. Use admin credentials: testadmin@example.com / password123
